# Invocation.Params

**Object**

The parameters of a client’s request.

## Declaration

```swift
object Invocation.Params
```

## Discussion

Objects that inherit from [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/Invocation] define their own parameters.
title: Invocation.Params
